reason_for_decision: The revised article now meets the strict pass threshold with stronger architectural depth, a clearer real-time definition, and a more neutral, system-level treatment.
strengths: The revised article now explains end-to-end data flow, edge-versus-central processing, and degraded-mode design in practical terms.
Removing the product-specific section improves neutrality and makes the article more consistent with the rest of the reviewed knowledge base.
The added sections on operator closure and monitoring-system metrics materially improve decision value.
summary_assessment: This revised version is strong enough to pass under the stricter workflow. It is materially fuller, more neutral, and more operationally useful than the initial draft.
